title: Claim closed: b0161235 (observability multi-sink + fixtures WS0 prelude landed)
body: Session-handoff close per /jc-session-handoff step 8. Claim b0161235 archived to closed-claims.archive.json with explicit closure. Two commits landed: 9356779d (doctrine graduation to principles.md § Architectural Excellence Over Expediency absolute framing) + e1840631 (plan promotion + supersession routing for two predecessor plans). Plan now at canonical repo path with WS0 todo complete; WS1 onwards is next-session work. No open conversations or escalations on this thread for this session. Branch state: feat/eef_exploration, 27 commits ahead of origin/main, push pending owner authorisation per the broader 2026-05-02 roadmap (observability fixes → local proof → PR → preview proof). Deep consolidation status assessed below.
